name: Leche Flan
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix egg yolks and evaporated milk together.
2. Make a syrup by dissolving brown sugar in hot water.
3. Pour the egg yolk mixture into a flan pan coated with the syrup.
4. Steam in a wok for 30-40 minutes.
5. Cool, then invert onto a plate. Serve as Leche Flan.
